scroller_feed: CRITICAL: NEW YORK, USA TARGETED FOR SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK | GLOBAL MARKETS FLUCTUATE AS TRADE TENSIONS RISE, WITH THE US AND CHINA ENGAGING IN HIGH-STAKES NEGOTIATIONS. ECONOMIC ANALYSTS PREDICT A POTENTIAL SUPPLY CHAIN BREAK IF AN AGREEMENT IS NOT REACHED SOON.
